name: Sunny Sharma
summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in scalable backend systems, AI-powered applications, and real-time platforms. I build end-to-end products using Spring Boot, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, and modern cloud-native architectures. My recent work includes AI recruitment systems, financial intelligence platforms, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and collaborative learning platforms.
shortBio: I build things that scale. From real-time collaborative editors to blockchain-based platforms, I love tackling complex engineering problems with clean, maintainable code.
